test1: A majestic snow-capped mountain peak dominates the center of the image against a cloudy sky. The mountain is blanketed in pristine white snow that glistens under the light. Below the peak, a forest of trees with dark green foliage stands tall, creating a beautiful contrast to the snowy landscape.
test2: A large rock formation with a dark gray surface is partially submerged in water, with white foam splashing around it. The rock is positioned on the left side of the frame, while the foam is on the right side.
test3: A serene lake with a deep blue surface reflecting the clear sky above. The calm water is dotted with small islands in the distance. The sky is painted in shades of light blue with wispy clouds scattered across it. On one side of the lake, there are trees standing tall and proud, their green leaves contrasting beautifully against the azure backdrop.
